name: Credential Not Expiring
description: KYA/vLEI credentials must not be within the expiry window (proposed threshold < 30 days).
rationale: Amber / flag-refer: a soft identity condition. Execution may continue in restricted mode pending credential renewal.

examples.passes: action with a credential valid well beyond the window
examples.fails: action whose KYA credential is < 30 days from expiry

source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
